title: Dead Estate
description:
FREE EXPANSIONS

Об игреCAN YOU SURVIVE?

Dead Estate is a gory, fast-paced, challenging, roguelike shooter with a heavy emphasis on Halloween and other horror influences. Ascend the floors of a monster-filled mansion with 10 unique characters, collect loads of items and weapons, tackle grueling challenges, and discover secrets and MANY unlockables along the way!

 

Beware of the lurking threats on every floor -- some are especially persistent... 

High replayability!• 10 playable characters, each with distinct playstyles and 4 Costumes each

• 150 weapons and 300 items to make each run unique 

• Explore the vast complexity of the Estate - discovering alternate floors & floor variants 

• An isometric style with compact rooms designed for tense, close-quarters combat 

• Try a looped run, or varying difficulty levels to push your skills

• Blessing & Curse run modifiers to maximize replayability

• 20 custom Challenge Runs

• A bounty of secrets to be discovered, and many more to be unlocked

 

Controller support is included, but a keyboard + mouse is recommended for the best experience.

ASSIGNMENT ANYAAn entirely separate campaign inspired by classic survival horror games, set prior to the events of the main game. Play as Anya, a fledgling actress who finds herself helplessly lost in the mansion after her film crew is attacked by the undead.

Abandoned by her leading man and left alone with nothing but a mask to disguise herself with, Anya must escape the increasingly warped and deadly estate all on her own.
description_short: Cornered with nowhere else to turn, can you escape the monster-filled mansion? Dead Estate is a gory, fast-paced, challenging roguelike shooter with a heavy emphasis on horror.
